user.title: Add 1Control SoloMini
user.description: Enter the BLE address of your SoloMini. Leave the LTK field empty — the integration will pair with the device automatically on first use.

data_description.address: BLE MAC address of the device, e.g. EF:73:A3:39:3B:E4

error.ltk_invalid: LTK must be 32 hexadecimal characters (16 bytes).
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to device. Check the BLE address and ensure the device is in range.
error.pairing_failed: Pairing failed. Ensure the device is in pairing mode.
